name: maungs-agentic-toolbelt
description: A project-agnostic, human-gated multi-agent software-development pipeline, ported to the OpenAI Codex CLI: skills shipped here via the marketplace; agents + hooks installed via install-codex.sh. Plan -> build -> review -> wrap-up, plus bug diagnosis, code translation, chores, handoffs, and a self-maintaining codebase wiki. Codex artifacts are generated from the canonical agents/*.md + skills/*/SKILL.md by tools/build.py.
